insights: Reported total registrations are 76,353; Jan-Jun monthly values sum to 103,211, creating a 26,858 gap.
Petrol leads with 38,874 registrations (50.9%), followed by Petrol CNG at 22,642 (29.7%).
Top 5 makers account for 52,603 registrations (68.9%); Maruti Suzuki is #1 at 17,395.
Top 5 offices account for 31,715 registrations (41.5%); RTA Rangareddy leads at 9,821.
22 rows have reported Total not equal to Jan-Jun sum. In each mismatch, Total is zero while monthly values are present.
June contributes 6,637 in monthly values, far below May's 21,531; treat June as a partial month unless source confirms complete coverage.
